name: Hybrid Identity - Azure AD Connect Credential Extraction
description: Detects Azure AD Connect credential extraction via AADInternals, MSOL account password extraction, ADSync database queries, and pass-through authentication backdoor installation.
query: process where event.type == "start" and (process.args : ("*AADInternals*", "*Get-AADIntSyncCredentials*", "*Install-AADIntPTASpy*", "*Export-AADIntADFSSigningCertificate*") or (process.name : ("sqlcmd.exe", "sqlservr.exe") and process.args : ("*ADSync*", "*mms_server*")) or process.args : "*MSOL_*")
